title: Fleischner Society Guidelines for Management of Incidental Pulmonary Nodules
snippet: Consensus recommendations for follow-up imaging intervals based on nodule size, morphology, and patient risk factors for solid and subsolid pulmonary nodules detected on CT.

title: Pulmonary nodule | Radiology Reference Article
snippet: Overview of solitary pulmonary nodule definitions, differential diagnosis, and imaging features distinguishing benign from malignant morphology on CT.

title: COVID-19 Chest CT Findings: A Systematic Review
snippet: Ground-glass opacities with peripheral and bilateral distribution are the most common CT finding in COVID-19 pneumonia, often with later consolidation.

title: Emphysema | Radiology Reference Article
snippet: Emphysema on CT is characterized by low-attenuation areas without visible walls, most reliably quantified with density-mask thresholding at -950 HU.

title: Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis: Diagnosis and Management
snippet: Usual interstitial pneumonia pattern on HRCT includes basal and peripheral reticulation, honeycombing, and traction bronchiectasis without other explanation.

title: Pleural effusion | Radiology Reference Article
snippet: Dependent fluid attenuation in the pleural space on CT, with meniscus sign; large effusions cause compressive atelectasis of adjacent lung.

title: RSNA Pneumonia Detection Challenge Dataset Description
snippet: Dataset and clinical criteria used for radiographic pneumonia detection challenges, including consolidation and opacity annotation guidelines.

title: Lung-RADS Assessment Categories for Screening CT
snippet: Structured reporting categories for lung cancer screening CT that stratify management recommendations by nodule size, density, and growth on follow-up.

title: Atelectasis | Radiology Reference Article
snippet: Volume loss patterns on CT including linear, subsegmental, and lobar atelectasis, with associated displacement of fissures and mediastinal structures.

title: LIDC-IDRI: A Completed Reference Database of Lung Nodules on CT Scans
snippet: Description of the LIDC-IDRI dataset methodology, including multi-radiologist annotation of nodule boundaries and malignancy likelihood scoring.
